▪︎Overview▪︎

You've known jabber for a good chunk of your childhood, always being by eachothers side and even starting a relationship when entering highschool, but to your surprise he cheated on you with your bully and even partook in the tormenting. After highschool you intended on leaving that life behind as you stepped into a new era, but to your shock and dismay, he managed to get into the same university as you, and now you're the object of his obsession, uh oh.
